title: Smoky Rye Baked Fish
description: A Thai-inspired dish featuring smoky fish baked with rich flavors and served with a side of rye.

ingredients.name: bake
ingredients.notes: such as soy sauce or oyster sauce

instructions: Grease a baking sheet with vegetable oil.
Dust the rye flour on a plate.
Place the smoked fish on the plate and coat both sides with rye flour.
In a small bowl, mix together the rich fish sauce, bake, chili flakes, and brown sugar.
Brush the mixture evenly over both sides of the fish.
Place the fish on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
